# Presentation Tokens — Generator Output

Generated by `cargo xtask presentation generate` from the single canonical
source at `xtask/src/presentation/source.json` (contract version `1.0.0`, source hash `b0d52d4c5b22`).

This is the U3-14 generator slice: it emits token artifacts alongside the
existing hand-written styles/themes. **Apps are not yet rewired to consume
these files** — that migration is a follow-up. Do not delete the existing
`aurora.css` files or `AxonTheme.kt`; the generated files below are additive.

## Generated files

| File | Consumed by (follow-up) |
|---|---|
| `docs/reference/presentation/tokens.md` | human reference |
| `docs/reference/presentation/tokens.schema.json` | schema validation for `source.json` |
| `apps/web/src/styles/axon-tokens.css` | web app root, alongside `aurora.css` |
| `apps/palette-tauri/src/styles/axon-tokens.css` | Palette desktop, alongside `aurora.css` |
| `apps/chrome-extension/src/styles/axon-tokens.css` | extension popup/content styles |
| `apps/android/app/src/main/java/com/axon/app/ui/theme/generated/AxonTokens.kt` | `AxonTheme.kt` migration target |
| `crates/axon-cli/src/ui/tokens.rs` | `CliTheme`/ad hoc CLI color sites |

Note: the Android artifact lives under the existing `apps/android/app` module
rather than the contract doc's illustrative `core/design` module path, because
no such module exists in this repo yet — creating one is out of scope for the
generator itself.

## Regenerating

```bash
cargo xtask presentation generate       # write/refresh all artifacts
cargo xtask presentation generate --check   # drift check, no writes
```

Generation is idempotent: running `generate` twice with an unchanged
`source.json` produces byte-identical output the second time.
